allow: PowerShell($line = Select-String -Path "C:\\project\\jangboda\\.env" -Pattern '^GEMINI_API_KEY=' -SimpleMatch | Select-Object -First 1; if \($null -eq $line\) { Write-Output "MISSING: .env에 GEMINI_API_KEY 줄이 아예 없음" } else { $val = \($line.Line -replace '^GEMINI_API_KEY=',''\).Trim\('"'\).Trim\("'"\); Write-Output \("FOUND: line=" + $line.LineNumber + " length=" + $val.Length + " starts_with_AIza=" + \($val.StartsWith\('AIza'\)\)\) })
